Document Templates
Click a template to fill in details and generate a professional document.
📝

Proposal Letter

Professional project proposal with scope, approach, timeline and investment.

🤝

Service Agreement

Full service contract with T&Cs, payment terms and legal clauses.

💰

Pricing Schedule

Detailed pricing breakdown and payment milestones. Annexure A to agreement.

📋

Invoice

GST-ready invoice with itemised services and payment details.

🔒

NDA

Non-disclosure agreement to protect client and Yamini Consulting Services confidentiality.

✅

Project Completion

Project handover and completion certificate for client sign off.

📝

Statement of Work (SOW)

Detailed scope document outlining deliverables, timelines, and responsibilities.

💸

Standalone Pricing

Independent pricing document for early stage discussions and quotations.

💾

Receipt

Payment acknowledgement receipt issued after payment is received.

📖

Terms and Conditions

General terms governing all Yamini Consulting Services engagements.

👁

Privacy Policy

Data handling and privacy practices for clients and website visitors.

💡

Intellectual Property Agreement

Defines ownership of work products and deliverables created by Yamini Consulting Services.

🔐

Data Processing Agreement

GDPR and data compliance agreement for handling client data.

🔁

Refund and Cancellation Policy

Clear terms around refunds, cancellations, and project terminations.

Message Templates
Professional cold outreach templates for LinkedIn and email. Copy, personalise the fields in brackets, and send.
in
LinkedIn Connection Request
300 character limit. Use when sending a connection request.
Hi [Name], I am Yamini Baskar, a freelance BI Consultant specialising in data infrastructure, dashboards, and analytics strategy. I help businesses make faster, clearer decisions with their data. Would be glad to connect.
ⓘ Replace: [Name]
in
LinkedIn Direct Message
Send after they accept your connection request.
Hi [Name], Thank you for connecting. I am a freelance BI Consultant running Yamini Consulting Services. I work directly with businesses to build reliable reporting, KPI frameworks, and data infrastructure that drive real decisions. I noticed [Company] is at an interesting stage of growth and data visibility often becomes a critical need at this point. I would be happy to have a brief conversation if that is something currently on your agenda. Best regards, Yamini Baskar Freelance BI Consultant, Yamini Consulting Services
ⓘ Replace: [Name], [Company]
📧
Cold Email
For direct email outreach to potential clients.
Subject: Improving Data Visibility at [Company]
Hi [Name], I hope this message finds you well. I am Yamini Baskar, a freelance BI Consultant and Founder of Yamini Consulting Services. As an independent consultant, I specialise in end to end BI solutions including dashboard development, KPI frameworks, and data infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Having delivered BI solutions for organisations including Amazon, Twitch, and Property Finder, I understand the data challenges that come with scale and how to solve them efficiently. I would welcome the opportunity to understand [Company]'s current reporting landscape and explore whether I can add value. Would a 20 minute call at your convenience be possible? Kind regards, Yamini Baskar Freelance BI Consultant Yamini Consulting Services [email protected] linkedin.com/in/yamini-baskar-/
ⓘ Replace: [Name], [Company]
🔄
Follow-Up Message
Send 5 to 7 days after the initial message with no response.
Hi [Name], I wanted to follow up on my previous message regarding BI and data reporting at [Company]. If this is not the right time, I completely understand. However, if data visibility or reporting efficiency is something on your radar, I would be glad to have a brief conversation. Thank you for your time. Best regards, Yamini Baskar Freelance BI Consultant, Yamini Consulting Services
ⓘ Replace: [Name], [Company]
💡 Outreach Tips
Personalise every message
Always replace [Name] and [Company] with real details. Add one specific observation about their business to show you have done your research.
Best time to send
Tuesday to Thursday, between 9am and 11am in the recipient's timezone tends to get the best response rates.
Follow up once, not twice
Send the follow-up message 5 to 7 days after the initial message. If there is no response after that, move on and try again in 3 months.
Target the right person
Reach out to Heads of Data, Analytics Managers, CTOs, or Operations Directors. Avoid generic company inboxes.
